reviews.review_description: Probably one of the most buggy games I have played in a while. It has some cool ideas but the bugs really need to be fixed. I will check this out after a while to see if it will get any better.

developer_response.body: that's why its now on Early Access

reviews.review_description: I bought early access and it gave me a LOT of items also some stuff is laggy but decent game!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for buying bundle and play the game
